heading: Prerequisites
body:
**Windows:**

Windows

- Atlas cluster with [BI Connector for Atlas](atlas/bi-connection)
  enabled

- Create a system Data Source Name (DSN)
  that uses the MongoDB ODBC driver

- [Tableau version 10.3](https://www.tableau.com/support/releases/desktop/10.3) or later

**Macos:**

macOS

- Atlas cluster with [BI Connector for Atlas](atlas/bi-connection)
  enabled

- Create a system Data Source Name (DSN)
  that uses the MongoDB ODBC driver

- [Tableau version 10.4](https://www.tableau.com/support/releases/desktop/10.4) or later
